title: National trends and disparities in Alzheimer disease's mortality (1999-2023) with scenario projections and a data-driven LSTM sensitivity analysis to 2043.
authors: Mohammad Bdair; A. Zahran; Hammam Jallad; I. Barham; Ather Qubbaj; Mohammad Aburabi’e; Baraa Jarrar; Joud Aburajab; Zaina Alsafareeni; Amal Mansor; Shahd Ghannam; Adnan Daor; Ahmad Daralbarmeel; Ahmad R. Awwad; Mohammad Khader; Abdelrahman Awawdeh
journal: European archives of psychiatry and clinical neuroscience
